narrative: US-Iran agreement to lift sanctions drives crude sell-off — WTI lower -5.22% as geopolitical risk premium unwinds; USD/JPY tests 160.06 intervention threshold despite 300bp Fed-BoJ carry; gold higher +2.53%; equities +0.50%; DXY -0.21%; VIX 17.7. Options market shows moderate put skew in USD/JPY (25d RR -1.10) as IV 7.2% vs HV30 3.4% signals rising protection demand. Watch BoJ Rate Decision tomorrow 02:30 UTC.
